projectStatus.focus: Promote the existing C++ native core from advisory snapshot evidence toward a controlled memory proposal gate while keeping Python policy and tool authority intact.

logs.title: Current architecture vault published
logs.summary: Updated the website to match the Obsidian architecture vault: Python runtime owns decisions today, native C++ core is advisory-only, and the next safe gate is the Native Memory Gate Bridge.

logs.title: Native Digital Life Vault Ingested
logs.summary: Integrated the master plan for Stark's Native Digital Life, detailing 12 implementation phases from specification hardening to native renderer research.

logs.title: Public StarkAGI website prepared
logs.summary: Created a GitHub Pages-ready landing page with a futuristic glass interface, local Anime.js bundle, and a placeholder repository link.

logs.title: Progress and devlog system added
logs.summary: Added a JSON-powered project progress page so future logs, milestone changes, and research updates can be edited without touching page layout code.

logs.title: Native kernel roadmap published
logs.summary: Documented the initial direction for a local-first StarkAGI kernel based on continuous state, memory resonance, sleep review, and bounded autonomy.

logs.title: Phase 2 - State Region Stabilization completed
logs.summary: Completed State Region Stabilization phase including stability scoring implementation, cross-region influence clamping, and protected attractor behavior.

logs.title: Phase 3 - Feedback and Correction Engine completed
logs.summary: Completed Feedback and Correction Engine phase with host approval gates, permission-level enforcement, and stable memory revision workflow.

logs.title: Phase 4 - Chronicle Evidence Spine completed
logs.summary: Completed Chronicle Evidence Spine phase creating durable evidence trail of cognitive state changes with controlled phrase rendering and explanation frame rendering.

logs.title: Phase 5 - Native Memory and MemoryStore Bridge completed
logs.summary: Completed Native Memory Bridge phase with isolated assistant/native_bridge package, observe-only feature flags, and learning trace export capabilities.

logs.title: Phase 6 - Drive Engine completed
logs.summary: Completed Drive Engine phase implementing idle system behavior, contradiction pressure, symbiosis relevance, and efficiency drives.

logs.title: Phase 7 - Projection Engine completed
logs.summary: Completed Projection Engine phase mapping internal state to external representations while preserving intent alignment.

logs.title: Phase 8 - Ollama Renderer Bridge completed
logs.summary: Completed Ollama Renderer Bridge phase establishing boundary between native core and LLM output with complexity gate for unsupported requests.

logs.title: Phase 9 - 24/7 Daemon Runtime completed
logs.summary: Completed 24/7 Daemon Runtime phase transitioning core to persistent background runtime with host approval requirements.

logs.title: Phase 10 - Work Mode Integration completed
logs.summary: Completed Work Mode Integration phase integrating core cognition into software engineering workflows with evidentiary standards.

logs.title: Phase 12 - Native Renderer Research completed
logs.summary: Completed Native Renderer Research phase with controlled phrase rendering, action reporting, explanation frames, and explicit unsupported complexity handling.

milestones.title: Native Advisory Snapshot
milestones.summary: Native health, tick, work planning, and snapshot data are visible to Python, but native cannot execute tools or bypass policy.

milestones.title: Native Memory Proposal Gate
milestones.summary: Expose MemoryCandidateProposal through the native bridge and route it through a Python MemoryGate before persistence.

milestones.title: Mode and Drive Influence
milestones.summary: Let native work mode and drive state influence behavior mode and prompt context without granting direct execution authority.

milestones.title: Permission Advisory Gate
milestones.summary: Require native advisory approval plus Python policy approval for selected high-impact actions.

milestones.title: Native Daemon Lifecycle Authority
milestones.summary: Promote native daemon state into a resident lifecycle signal after memory and permission gates are stable.

milestones.title: Native Primary State Substrate
milestones.summary: Native state becomes the first-class continuity layer while Python provides UI, tools, persistence, and rendering.

notes.title: Current authority boundary
notes.body: Python gateway, orchestrator, memory, policy, tools, and LLM runtime own shipped behavior today. The C++ native core provides advisory evidence.

notes.title: Do not skip the bridge
notes.body: The safe next promotion step is the Native Memory Gate Bridge, not direct native tool execution or broad daemon authority.

notes.title: Memory as active state
notes.body: Retrieved memory should be compiled into active cognitive state with source, authority, confidence, and purpose instead of becoming raw system authority.
